title: Configure mainnet ledger canister IDs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC

requirements.summary: Set official Internet Computer mainnet ledger canister IDs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC so the Send UI is enabled for each token.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/config/tokens.ts, TOKENS.ckETH.ledgerCanisterId is set to the official mainnet ckETH ledger canister ID: ss2fx-dyaaa-aaaar-qacoq-cai.
In frontend/src/config/tokens.ts, TOKENS.ckBTC.ledgerCanisterId is set to the official mainnet ckBTC ledger canister ID (do not leave undefined).
In frontend/src/config/tokens.ts, TOKENS.ckUSDC.ledgerCanisterId is set to the official mainnet ckUSDC ledger canister ID (do not leave undefined).
On the Dashboard Tokens section, the “Not configured” warning no longer appears for ckBTC, ckETH, or ckUSDC send panels, and the send form renders for all three tokens.

file_operations.description: Populate TOKENS.ckBTC.ledgerCanisterId, TOKENS.ckETH.ledgerCanisterId (ss2fx-dyaaa-aaaar-qacoq-cai), and TOKENS.ckUSDC.ledgerCanisterId with their official Internet Computer mainnet ledger canister IDs so isTokenConfigured() returns true and the Send panels render instead of the “Not configured” warning.
